seizures.text: 26.11.2025 - DRI seizes 5.685 kg gold dust in wax form near Mumbai Central Railway Station; two persons arrested.
22.11.2025 - DRI seizes 1049.72 grams of foreign-origin gold from two persons at Sargachhi Railway Station  Berhampore; 2 persons arrested.
19.11.2025 - DRI detects diversion of 26 kg duty-free imported gold into domestic market under misuse of Advance Authorisation scheme; three persons arrested.
18.11.2025 - DRI seizes 1 620 gram of gold dust in wax form from two passengers arriving in Mumbai from Madinah; 2 persons arrested.
11.11.2025 - DRI seizes 1 935.19 gram foreign origin gold in Kolkata; 3 persons arrested.
11.11.2025 - DRI seizes 11.88 kg gold and 8.72 kg silver in Mumbai; 11 persons arrested under Operation Bullion Blaze.
04.11.2025 - DRI seizes 534 grams foreign origin gold in paste form from a passenger arriving at Jaipur; 1 person arrested.
31.10.2025 - DRI seizes 733 gram foreign origin gold in paste form concealed on a passenger arriving from Bangkok to Chennai; 1 person arrested.
31.10.2025 - DRI seizes 2.25 kg foreign-origin gold recovered during train-based surveillance and follow up search in Delhi; 3 persons arrested.
28.10.2025 - DRI seizes 1.083 kg foreign-origin gold in paste form concealed in a car at Akhepura toll plaza  Rajasthan; one person arrested.
16.10.2025 - DRI seizes 1.798 kg foreign-origin gold concealed in baggage of a passenger arriving from Kuwait via Sharjah at Rajiv Gandhi International Airport  Hyderabad; one person arrested.
15.10.2025 - DRI seizes 396.440 grams of foreign-origin assorted gold jewellery from a passenger arriving from Dubai to Amritsar.
15.10.2025 - DRI seizes 430.440 grams of foreign-origin assorted gold jewellery from a passenger arriving from Dubai to Amritsar.
12.10.2025 - DRI seizes 2 332.66 grams foreign-origin gold at India-Bangladesh border  Maluapara; one person arrested.
12.10.2025 - DRI seizes 3.941 kg gold bars at Mumbai Airport; four persons arrested.
11.10.2025 - DRI seizes 10.488 kg  gold in wax form at Mumbai Airport; 13 persons arrested.
04.10.2025 - DRI seizes 5 048 grams foreign-origin gold and Rs. 30.5 lakh cash from multiple passengers at Delhi and Patna Railway Stations; four persons arrested.
04.10.2025 - DRI seizes 5 048 grams foreign-origin gold and Rs. 30.5 lakh cash from multiple passengers at Delhi and Patna Railway Stations; four persons arrested.
02.10.2025 - DRI busts gold smuggling syndicate at Mumbai Airport; 1.46 kg gold seized. Airport staffer  Bangladeshi transit passenger  handler  and receiver arrested.
01.10.2025 - DRI seizes 2 765.2 grams gold bullion from a passenger on Dibrugarh-New Delhi Rajdhani Express at Barauni; one person arrested.
